name: Sebino S.p.A.
summary: Sebino S.p.A. engages in the design, development, installation, and maintenance of fire-fighting systems for the detection of fires or intrusions. It also provides security system integration services for smoke detection, anti-intrusion, access control, video surveillance with video analysis, and other systems; and services for system, fire prevention, security, smoke detection, and CCTV. The company was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Madone, Italy.
